creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
No, when cross-compiling CXX will be cross-compiler. Example:
We want to compile kodi for arm (target) on amd64 (host). CXX is set to generate
binaries for arm (target), JsonSchemaBuilder must be compiled and executed later on host (amd64) so we set CXX to c++ system compiler to be sure to compile it's
code for host (amd64).
